No worries if you're not sure how to start, thatвҖҷs totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
вҖә Tease back: Say youвҖҷd only have a kid if it had your last name.
вҖә Reverse it: Ask him if he even knows how to hold a baby without setting it on fire.
вҖә Call his bluff: Hand him something random like itвҖҷs a baby and tell him to prove it.
вҖә Play it soft: Brush past him and say heвҖҷd actually make a great dad
